history: The patient has a history of mechanical heart valve prostheses and moderate renal insufficiency. She was on warfarin therapy with a usual international normalized ratio (INR) of 2.5-3.5. Treatment with oseltamivir for influenza was introduced, leading to a rapid increase in the INR value within less than a week and a recurrence of digestive bleeding.
exam: Vital signs and physical examination findings are not provided.
correct_diagnosis: Gastrointestinal hemorrhage due to warfarin/oseltamivir drug interaction
differentials: Gastrointestinal hemorrhage due to warfarin/oseltamivir drug interaction
Gastrointestinal hemorrhage due to warfarin toxicity
Gastrointestinal hemorrhage due to oseltamivir toxicity
Gastrointestinal hemorrhage due to mechanical heart valve prostheses
Gastrointestinal hemorrhage due to mechanical trauma
